revision.comment: Bot: create Islamic-calendar day stub
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: overwrite Islamic-day stub
revision.text:
{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Shawwal 21''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 21st day of the month [[Shawwal]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 21 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Shawwal]] [[ar:21 شوال]] [[fa:۲۱ شوال]] [[id:21 Syawal]] [[sd:21 شوال]] [[ur:21 شوال]]

{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Shawwal 21''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 21st day of the month [[Shawwal]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 21 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Shawwal]] [[ar:21 شوال]] [[fa:۲۱ شوال]] [[id:21 Syawal]] [[sd:21 شوال]] [[ur:21 شوال]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

revision.comment: Bot: overwrite Islamic-day stub
revision.text:
{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Shawwal 21''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 21st day of the month [[Shawwal]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 21 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Shawwal]] [[ar:21 شوال]] [[fa:۲۱ شوال]] [[id:21 Syawal]] [[sd:21 شوال]] [[ur:21 شوال]]

revision.comment: Bot: undo edit ([[Special:Diff/4136121]])
Text replacement - "{{Expand Arabic}}↵{{Expand Bengali}}↵{{Expand Persian}}" to ""
adding the templates to the front above the calendar template
bumping these so I can see the more important ones that have not been recently edited
Bot: add wikidata link from Indonesian interwiki (Q4121404)
working on the date checking
Adding [[Category:Qq 4]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] to [[Category:Qq 1]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Unchecked Islamic Dates]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq 1]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "[[Category:Qq 4]]" to ""
Bot: add interwikis from Wikidata

{{Expand Arabic}}
{{Expand Bengali}}
{{Expand Persian}}
{{Islamic Shawwal}}

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Pages]] (crud category cleanup)
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ar:21 شوال]][[fa:۲۱ شوال]][[id:21 Syawal]][[ms:21 Syawal]][[sd:21 شوال]][[ur:21 شوال]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ar:21 شوال]][[fa:۲۱ شوال]][[id:21 Syawal]][[ms:21 Syawal]][[sd:21 شوال]][[ur:21 شوال]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ar:21 شوال]][[fa:۲۱ شوال]][[id:21 Syawal]][[ms:21 Syawal]][[sd:21 شوال]][[ur:21 شوال]] {{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} {{Islamic Shawwal}}
'''Shawwal 21''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 21st day of the month [[Shawwal]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[ar:21 شوال]] [[fa:۲۱ شوال]] [[id:21 Syawal]] [[sd:21 شوال]] [[ur:21 شوال]] {{Islamic Calendar}}
{{wikidata link|Q4121404}} [[Category:Days 21 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Shawwal]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Pages without translation templates]]
